name: asynchronia
description: Project-specific safety gates and evidence workflows for Codex work in the Asynchronia repository.

interface.longDescription: Provides project-specific repository context, runtime isolation, routing, smoke orchestration, deployment verification, acceptance gating, and validation rules for safe Asynchronia changes.
defaultPrompt: Gate this Asynchronia task for runtime safety.
Review this task scope before making edits.
Plan the smallest sufficient smoke workflow for this Asynchronia task.
Check whether this Asynchronia evidence is enough to mark the task accepted.
